track_characteristics.shape: Oval with short, tight home straight and sharp turns
track_characteristics.turn_bias: Heavy bias towards runners positioned on or near the speed due to short 230m straight
track_characteristics.soil_type: Loam / Sand-based Turf (Drains moderately well in tropical weather)

bias_notes.general: Short home straight makes it extremely difficult for backmarkers to make up ground late unless pace is frantic.

barrier_impact.sprints_upto_1250m: Inside to middle barriers (1-6) hold a significant advantage with short runs to the first turn.
barrier_impact.mile_1400m_1900m: Barriers 1-5 favoured to secure an economical run on the rail before the tight back straight turn.

running_styles.leader: High Advantage - Lone leaders on tight turns dominate
running_styles.on_pace: Strong Advantage - Needs to be top 3 at the 400m mark
running_styles.midfield: Moderate Disadvantage - Requires early movement before the home turn
running_styles.backmarker: Severe Disadvantage - Rarely wins without extreme pace battles up front
